subject: npmx Weekly #19
headline: npmx Weekly #19
intro: Celebrating love, community, and inclusivity this month! Check out our top highlights that make a difference.

topics.title: Pride Month Celebrations
topics.summary: Join us in honoring Pride Month with heartfelt messages supporting the LGBTQ+ community, emphasizing love and recognition during this important time.

topics.title: Internationalization Updates
topics.summary: We've improved localization by implementing the Intl.NumberFormat API, ensuring accurate display of size percentages across different languages, enhancing user experience.

topics.title: Community Engagement Game
topics.summary: Participate in our new interactive game to guess a package from a timeline graph! Win a $20 donation to an open-source project of your choice and promote community support.
